creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
also, the dependency lists are all wrong.

please get help from freebsd-ports.  join redports (google for it), 
don't re-submit this port until you get this to compile fine on redports.


===>   Installing for py27-setuptools-0.6c11_3
===>    py27-setuptools-0.6c11_3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found
PKG_PREFIX=/usr/local /bin/sh /work/a/ports/devel/py-setuptools/work/pkg-install py27-setuptools-0.6c11_3 PRE-INSTALL
===>    Generating temporary packing list
===>   Checking if devel/py-setuptools already installed
===>    py27-setuptools-0.6c11_3 is already installed
       You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
       by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
       If you really wish to overwrite the old port of devel/py-setuptools
       without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
       in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/devel/py-setuptools.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/net-p2p/tahoe-lafs.
